_comment: Global destination config. Country → regions (cities/areas). generate.mjs builds region×topic targets for every ACTIVE country. Flip active:true (and seed) one country at a time to keep daily output focused and high-quality. Places search uses '<topic> in <region> <country>'.

countries.name: South Korea
countries.blurb: Palaces and K-pop, temple stays and night markets, mountains and beaches — an easy, hyper-connected country to explore.

countries.name: Japan
countries.blurb: Neon cities and serene shrines, bullet trains and hot springs, world-class food from street stalls to sushi counters.

countries.name: United States
countries.blurb: From Manhattan skylines to desert canyons, road trips, national parks, and a different culture in every city.

countries.name: Thailand
countries.blurb: Golden temples, island beaches, street-food feasts, and famously warm hospitality across a compact, affordable country.

countries.name: France
countries.blurb: Paris and beyond — vineyards, Riviera beaches, alpine villages, and some of the world's greatest food and art.

countries.name: Italy
countries.blurb: Ancient Rome, Renaissance Florence, canals of Venice, coastal cliffs, and a food culture that changes region by region.

countries.name: China
countries.blurb: The Great Wall and Forbidden City, futuristic megacities, karst mountains, and 5,000 years of history and cuisine.

countries.name: Spain
countries.blurb: Gaudí's Barcelona, Moorish Andalusia, tapas and late nights, sun-soaked coasts and world-famous festivals.

countries.name: Vietnam
countries.blurb: Motorbike-buzzing cities, emerald Ha Long Bay, terraced rice fields, French-colonial streets, and some of Asia's best street food.

countries.name: United Arab Emirates
countries.blurb: Futuristic Dubai skylines, desert safaris, gold souks and grand mosques, and record-breaking towers rising from the Gulf.

countries.name: Taiwan
countries.blurb: Night-market feasts, hot springs and towering peaks, temple towns and Taipei's neon buzz — friendly, compact, and easy to explore.

countries.name: Indonesia
countries.blurb: Bali's rice terraces and beaches, volcano sunrises, Komodo dragons, and thousands of islands of temples, surf and jungle.

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.blurb: Kuala Lumpur's towers, island beaches, rainforest and tea highlands, and a street-food scene where Malay, Chinese and Indian flavors meet.

countries.name: India
countries.blurb: The Taj Mahal and pink-city palaces, Himalayan foothills and backwaters, dazzling festivals, and food that changes every few hundred kilometers.

countries.name: Philippines
countries.blurb: Thousands of islands of white-sand beaches and turquoise lagoons, world-class diving, rice terraces, and warm, English-friendly hospitality.

countries.name: Turkey
countries.blurb: Istanbul where two continents meet, Cappadocia's balloon-filled skies, turquoise coasts and ancient ruins, and legendary bazaar and food culture.

countries.name: Singapore
countries.blurb: A futuristic city-state where hawker-stall feasts, Marina Bay's skyline, lush gardens, and a blend of Malay, Chinese, Indian and Peranakan cultures meet — clean, safe, and effortless to explore.
